basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Program Assistant I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 1 Program Assistant I vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Com./B.B.A. (Finance) or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline
qualification.details: Program Assistant I: B.Com./B.B.A. (Finance) or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Gandhinagar Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Program Assistant I: B.Com./B.B.A. (Finance) or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline. The percentage/grade points with respect to the academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th.

IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Salary 2026
IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Program Assistant I post at IIT Gandhinagar is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Program Assistant I position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com./B.B.A. (Finance) or an equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline. Additionally, a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Program Assistant I role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Program Assistant I post is 32 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Program Assistant I position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Program Assistant I post ranges from Rs. 28,000/- to Rs. 44,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Program Assistant I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Program Assistant I position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Gandhinagar Program Assistant I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Program Assistant I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written/Practical Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application link?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
